# Annual review checklist (Phase 2)
- [ ] Re-verify each authoritative text against its official source; refresh `verification{}`.
- [ ] Confirm no silent amendments/consolidations (UN Treaty Collection XXI.10; COP decisions).
- [ ] Ingest new COP / PrepCom / national instruments per the source-coverage map.
- [ ] Close any open items in GAPS.md; triage queue/candidates.md.
- [ ] `validate_corpus.py` green; regenerate derived + site.
